sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114710" key="xrhsto/filos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρηστό-φῐλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n114710.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">possessed of good friends,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg038.perseus-grc1:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n114710.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">trusty friend,</tr_> opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κακόφιλος,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Rhetor.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).146</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
